steps.title: Compare the two methods
steps.content: Road maps are described as not very accurate, while Rahman's program more accurately identified sidewalks and could even distinguish materials. The blank must describe better performance.

steps.title: Choose the stronger word
steps.content: A is vague and awkward in the phrase, C contradicts the stated improvement, and D does not express a performance comparison. Superior fits because the program performed better than the road-map method. The answer is B.
